title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Hopscotch - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Hopscotch - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Hopscotch. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About Hopscotch:
Hopscotch is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hopscotch!
